hba1c.source: NHANES 2017-2020; CDC National Diabetes Statistics Report 2024

bmi.source: NHANES 2017-2020; CDC BRFSS 2022 national obesity prevalence 41.9%

systolic_bp.source: NHANES 2017-2020; AHA 2023 hypertension prevalence 48.1% US adults

creatinine.source: NHANES 2017-2020 CKD surveillance; KDIGO 2022 reference ranges

temporal_trends._source: CDC BRFSS trend data 2018-2024; CMS Part D utilization trends; US Census Bureau age projections

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 6-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 6-month drift interval

6.source: CDC Diabetes Surveillance 2024; CMS Drug Utilization 2024; US Census 2024 projections

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 12-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 12-month drift interval

12.source: CDC Diabetes Surveillance 2024; CMS Drug Utilization 2024; US Census 2024 projections

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 18-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 18-month drift interval

18.source: CDC Diabetes Surveillance 2024; CMS Drug Utilization 2024; US Census 2024 projections
